articles.description: After Nottingham Forest's stunning win at Sunderland, is the Premier League relegation battle now a two-horse race?
articles.title: Premier League relegation battle: Is it between West Ham and Spurs after Forest win?

articles.description: Swapping Welsh roots for the England captaincy could be enough to turn a nation against you. But Meg Jones is different.
articles.title: Meg Jones: Red Roses captain on skippering England and representing Wales

articles.description: Thirty years after their first match at the Crucible, 50-year-olds Ronnie O'Sullivan and John Higgins again go head-to-head on the biggest stage.
articles.title: Ronnie O'Sullivan and John Higgins renew their rivalry at the 2026 World Snooker Championship

articles.description: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes speaks to club legend Wayne Rooney in a wide-ranging interview.
articles.title: Bruno Fernandes talks to Wayne Rooney about Man Utd, the past, the future and England v Portugal

articles.description: BBC Sport discusses why Lionesses hero Chloe Kelly is not guaranteed a spot for club or country.
articles.title: Arsenal vs Lyon: Why Chloe Kelly is not an automatic starter before Champions League semi-final

articles.description: Aaron Ramsey has only just retired but is running the London Marathon in memory of his friend Ceri's "amazing" son Hugh, who died of a rare cancer aged six.
articles.title: Aaron Ramsey: Ex-Wales captain runs London Marathon in memory of 'amazing' young boy

articles.description: Real Madrid's slim title hopes suffer another setback as they squander victory against Real Betis by conceding a 93rd-minute equaliser.
articles.title: Real Betis 1-1 Real Madrid: Title hopes fading for Los Blancos with La Liga draw

articles.description: Tottenham Hotspur fans will not want to contemplate relegation - but if the worst should happen, they may take solace from a season in the Championship.
articles.title: Tottenham: Could Spurs fans take solace from a season in the Championship?

articles.description: Jim Furyk is confirmed as captain of the US Ryder Cup team in 2027, when the event takes place in Ireland.
articles.title: Ryder Cup 2027: Jim Furyk to return as US Ryder Cup captain in 2027

articles.description: Defending champion Carlos Alcaraz says he will miss next month's French Open because of an ongoing wrist injury.
articles.title: French Open: Carlos Alcaraz to miss Grand Slam title defence with wrist injury
